projectDescription: A TypeScript library for building type-safe Cloudflare Workflows from composable typed steps, with a Vite plugin that auto-generates Wrangler bindings and environment types.
keyFeatures: Composable typed steps with Effect Schema-backed payload and result validation
Vite plugin (withCloudflareWorkflows) auto-discovers workflow layers and generates Wrangler bindings and env types
Zero wrangler.toml/wrangler.jsonc editing required for workflow setup
Cloudflare-native runtime — generates real WorkflowEntrypoint subclasses, nothing emulated
Support for Effect.Effect return values alongside plain async/Promise in step and workflow run functions
Built-in rollback handler attachment via Rollback.with()
Static TypeScript AST-based workflow discovery (no runtime execution during build)
Manual WorkflowEntrypoints.make() adapter for plain Wrangler setups without Vite
Portable NonRetryableError converted to native Cloudflare error at the entrypoint boundary
publicApiSurface: WorkflowDefinition.toLayer(run) — attaches a run implementation, producing a WorkflowLayer
Step.make(name, options) — creates a reusable typed StepDefinition
Rollback.with(handler, config?) — attaches a rollback handler to a StepDefinition via .pipe()
Schema — re-exported from effect for payload/result schema definitions
NonRetryableError — portable non-retryable workflow error class
WorkflowEngine.make(exportName, layer, WorkflowEntrypoint, options) — internal runtime bridge
WorkflowEngine.run(layer, options) — runs a workflow layer with native Cloudflare event/step
collectWorkflowEntries(patterns, baseDirectory) — discovers workflow layer exports (sideffect/vite)
SideffectStep.do(step, payload, options?) — executes a typed step inside a workflow
SideffectStep.sleepUntil(name, timestamp) — pauses until a timestamp
SideffectStep.waitForEvent(name, options) — waits for a named external event
